first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score and identify the same core strengths (senior engineer, recent relevant AI work) and weaknesses (lack of Python, insufficient years of AI experience, missing RAG/vector DB knowledge). The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of typical run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in assessment due to the redaction of the candidate's name and personal URLs.
